name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient receipt management causes cash flow gaps. We automate receipt conversion into standardized accounting entries instead of manual entry of receipts into accounting software.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient receipt management causes cash flow gaps. We automate receipt conversion into standardized accounting entries instead of manual entry of receipts into accounting software.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual entry of receipts into accounting software

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient receipt management causes cash flow gaps. We automate receipt conversion into standardized accounting entries instead of manual entry of receipts into accounting software.
